```{r}
library(PIPoL)
library(phyloseq)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(decontam)
library(ggplot2)

load("../Real_Data/oral_16S_neg.RData")
```



```{r}
samples <- sample_names(physeq)
parts <- str_split_fixed(samples, "\\.", 4)
label <- ifelse(str_detect(tolower(parts[, 2]), "blank"), "blank",
                ifelse(str_detect(tolower(parts[, 3]), "salb"), "salb", "other"))
sample_data(physeq)$GroupLabel <- label

tax <- as(tax_table(physeq), "matrix")
keep <- !is.na(tax[, "Genus"])
physeq <- prune_taxa(keep, physeq)

physeq@sam_data$is.neg <- ifelse(physeq@sam_data$GroupLabel == "blank", 1, 0)
```

```{r}

contam_database <- read.csv("../Real_Data/contamination_database.csv")
oral_database <- read.csv("../Real_Data/oral_database.csv")
HOMD <- read.csv("../Real_Data/homd_taxonomy_table.csv")

oral_cult <- unique(HOMD$Genus[HOMD$Status %in% c('Named','Unnamed')])
oral_vis <- unique(oral_database$Genus)
oral <- unique(c(oral_cult, oral_vis))

contam_df <- contam_database %>%
  group_by(Genus) %>%
  mutate(numberstudies = length(unique(Reference))) %>%
  as.data.frame()
contam <- unique(contam_df$Genus)

core_res <- decontamination(
    physeq = physeq,
    outcome_var = "GroupLabel",
    label = "blank",
    tau = "Genus",
    alpha = 0.05,
    gamma_weighted = 0.1,
    gamma_unweighted = 0.1
)

tt <- core_res$table 

tt$TAXprev <- rowSums(otu_table(physeq) > 0)[match(tt$OTU, taxa_names(physeq))]
tt$TAXsums <- taxa_sums(physeq)[match(tt$OTU, taxa_names(physeq))]
tax_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(physeq))
tt$Genus <- tax_df$Genus[match(tt$OTU, rownames(tax_df))]

tt$Group <- "Ambiguous"
tt$Group[tt$Genus %in% oral & !tt$Genus %in% contam] <- "Oral"
tt$Group[tt$Genus %in% contam & !tt$Genus %in% oral] <- "Contaminant"

tt$Prevalence_Group <- cut(as.numeric(tt$TAXprev), 
                           breaks = c(-Inf, 2, 5, 10, Inf), 
                           labels = c("2", "3-5", "6-10", "11+"))

p_ref <- plot_reference_scatter(
  results_df = tt,
  score_x = "CoexistZ",
  score_y = "CoenrichZ", 
  group_col = "Group",
  abundance_col = "TAXsums", 
  prevalence_col = "Prevalence_Group",
  facet = TRUE,
  prevalence_bins = NULL,
  alpha = 0.5
) 

p_ref <- p_ref + 

  ggplot2::facet_grid(~Prevalence_Group) + 
  
  ggplot2::scale_size_area(max_size = 12) + 
  
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Oral" = "blue", "Contaminant" = "red", "Ambiguous" = "gray80"),
    name = "Reference\nClassification"
  ) +
  
  ggplot2::labs(x = "Score (Coexists Z-score)", y = "Score (Coenrich Z-score)") +
  ggplot2::theme_light() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 11)
  ) +
  ggplot2::guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4, alpha = 1)), size = "none")

print(p_ref)
```

```{r}

tt$CoexistProb <- pnorm(tt$CoexistZ)
tt$CoenrichProb <- pnorm(tt$CoenrichZ)

p_ref <- plot_reference_scatter(
  results_df = tt,
  score_x = "CoexistProb",
  score_y = "CoenrichProb", 
  group_col = "Group",
  abundance_col = "TAXsums",
  prevalence_col = "Prevalence_Group",
  facet = TRUE,
  prevalence_bins = NULL,
  n_prevalence_bins = NULL,
  alpha = 0.5
) 

p_ref <- p_ref + 

  ggplot2::facet_grid(~Prevalence_Group) + 
  
  ggplot2::scale_size_area(max_size = 10) + 
  
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Oral" = "blue", "Contaminant" = "red", "Ambiguous" = "gray80"),
    name = "Reference\nClassification"
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(x = "Score (Coexists)", y = "Score (Coenrich)") +
  
  ggplot2::theme_light() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold", size = 11),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "white")
  ) +
  ggplot2::guides(
    color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4, alpha = 1)),
    size = "none"
  )

print(p_ref)
```


```{r}
# --- 1. 还原原始脚本的 Z -> P 转换逻辑 ---
# 原始脚本认为分数越小越像污染物，所以我们取单尾概率
tt$coexists.p <- stats::pnorm(tt$CoexistZ, lower.tail = FALSE)
tt$coenrich.p <- stats::pnorm(tt$CoenrichZ, lower.tail = FALSE)

# --- 2. 流行度分箱 (严格对齐原图的 2, 3-5, 6-10, 11+) ---
tt$Prevalence_Group <- cut(
  as.numeric(tt$TAXprev), 
  breaks = c(0, 2, 5, 10, Inf), 
  labels = c("2", "3-5", "6-10", "11+")
)

# --- 3. 绘图调用 ---
p_ref <- plot_reference_scatter(
  results_df = tt,
  score_x = "coexists.p", 
  score_y = "coenrich.p",
  group_col = "Group",
  abundance_col = "TAXsums", 
  prevalence_col = "Prevalence_Group",
  facet = TRUE,
  alpha = 0.5
) 

# --- 4. 样式深度对齐 (还原 Fig A 的质感) ---
p_ref <- p_ref + 
  ggplot2::facet_grid(~Prevalence_Group) +
  # 调整点的大小，确保高丰度属（Genus）是大球
  ggplot2::scale_size_area(max_size = 12) + 
  # 恢复 0-1 坐标轴
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  # 颜色方案
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Oral" = "blue", "Contaminant" = "red", "Ambiguous" = "gray80"),
    name = "Reference\nClassification"
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(x = "Score (Coexists)", y = "Score (Coenrich)") +
  # 使用 light 主题配合网格线
  ggplot2::theme_light() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "white")
  ) +
  ggplot2::guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 4, alpha = 1)), size = "none")

print(p_ref)
```
